name: Perplexity
summary: AI-powered answer engine with cited sources. Public no-login basic queries. Pro tier for advanced reasoning models.

claims.claim: Verify the Perplexity homepage loads with a search input field visible without requiring sign-in
Type the literal query 'What is the capital of France and what is its population?' into the main search input and submit it. Verify an answer appears on the page.
Verify the rendered answer includes at least one numbered citation link or source reference
Type a follow-up question 'When was it founded?' into the follow-up or new search input and submit it. Verify a second answer appears.
claims.evidence: The corpus does not provide relevant content regarding the follow-up question feature.

claims.claim: Verify a pricing or pro plan page is reachable from navigation and lists at least one paid plan
claims.evidence: The homepage does not contain any links to a pricing or pro plan page.
